pending.body: Fix the implementer source-attribution regression in backend diagnostics. `src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs:427-435` now injects a compiled-default `workflow.implementer_backend` selection (`codex`) even when the user never set that key, and `src/contexts/agent_execution/diagnostics.rs:1482-1497` already treats that role as an explicit override for `backend check`/`probe`. But `src/contexts/agent_execution/diagnostics.rs:1526-1552` still collapses any default-sourced `workflow.implementer_backend` entry to `default_backend (...)`. In a fresh workspace, `backend show-effective --json` therefore reports the implementer as `codex/gpt-5.4-high` with `override_source = "default_backend (default)"`, even though changing `default_backend` no longer changes that role. Update `show-effective` to attribute the implementer to `workflow.implementer_backend` (or another explicit implementer-default label) whenever the role is resolved via the compiled implementer default, and add a regression test in `tests/unit/backend_diagnostics_test.rs`.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 3 -> Plan and Implement
